name: Oil Pulling
description: Swishing coconut oil to reduce Streptococcus mutans and plaque through lipophilic biofilm penetration — clinically shown to reduce gingivitis in controlled trials.
effectivenessNote: Clinical studies confirm reduction in S. mutans and plaque. Comparable to chlorhexidine mouthwash in some trials. Requires 10–20 minutes vs seconds for commercial mouthwash.
warnings: Spit into trash, not sink (oil clogs drains)
Not a substitute for brushing and flossing
scienceNote: Lipophilic coconut oil penetrates bacterial biofilms that water-based mouthwash cannot reach. Lauric acid disrupts bacterial cell membranes. Mechanical swishing action dislodges plaque.
